title: Create & Farm
description: A simple modpack focusing on the mods Create and Farmer's Delight. You can build contraptions and cook delicious meals.
body:
![Banner image for Create and Farm, with the title on top of a green tinted screenshot of a house and a farm form the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c81d00e5925795c857596264456e4c7533d40c9d.png)

# Welcome to Create and Farm!

Create and Farm is a vanilla+ modpack focused on the mods Create and Farmer's Delight. It focuses on providing a cozy and easy experience without many changes to vanilla Minecraft mechanics.

## Farming

With the Farmer's Delight mod and it's addon Rustic Delight you can start a cosy cottagecore farm in minecraft. You can use new crops such as onions, tomatoes, peppers and more to cook delicious meals in the new cooking pot block. There's also a faster alternative to campfire cooking - the skillet (which also doubles as a nice weapon).

## Create Contraptions

Thanks to the Create mod you can automate almost every aspect of Minecraft (of course only if you want to). By utilising appliances powered by rotational force you can break blocks faster, craft items using less resources, obtain previously non-renewable resources and much more.

## Decoration

Combining the decorational blocks from Farmer's Delight, Create, Vanilla Minecraft and the amazing mod Another Furniture, allows you to build literally anything. From cottagecore houses to steampunk factories, in Create And Farm everything is possible.

## Quality of life

Tired of running out of inventory space, not being able to find that one wood type, or constantly having to check on your animals? Create and Farm adds many QoL features, such as the backpacks from the Inmis mod, the feeding trough or the Nature's Compass. With them you experience will be less frustrating and more relaxed.
